rationale.R1.2: Identifies some consistency issues but doesn't address all load-bearing inconsistencies.
rationale.R1.3: Flags some unsupported claims but doesn't audit every claim against evidence.
rationale.RX.1: Marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, handling uncertainty well.
